1.name: [1] Malleable Visage
1.description: A vampire with this power may alter their bodily parameters: height, build, voice, facial features, and skin tone, among other things. Such changes are cosmetic and minor in scope. They might, for example, resume their mortal coloration; make themselves resemble a Moor, Viking, or Saracen, or even copy the form of a web-fingered naiad or faerie noble.

1.name: Changeling
references: Players Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 112

5.description: Instantly transform into a pool of sentient vitae Inner Mastery : Alter internal processings of the body, even manipulating mental attributes or giving derangements . 6.name: [6] Body Arsenal
6.description: Transform the bones in your body into weapons Blood of Acid : Permanently make your vitae highly corrosive Chiropteran Marauder : Transform into a huge, flying bat Corrupt Construction : Create a frankenstein monster (such as a Vozhd) by adding pieces of dead bodies onto a living being Ecstatic Agony : Change the pain of wounds into pleasure Entrail Saraband : Turn your bowels into writhing tendrils Graft Life to Life : Attach the limbs of one person to another without it becoming useless Living Testudo : Use a victim as a living weapon and shield Plasmic Form : As Bloodform , except you can move and hold any shape as a pool Skin Trap : Peel off a layer of skin to use as a net

7.name: [7] Blood of the Earth
7.description: Your Blood becomes a viscous substance that burns when it is exposed to air. Cocoon : Wrap yourself into an incredibly resilient shell Flesh Rot : Give a target a disease that eats away at their body Impaler's Fence : Cause a victim's spine to shoot up and down them Kraken's Kiss : Transform your face into a tentacle that can drain blood Liquefy the Mortal Coil : Turn victim body parts into blood. Transcend the Flesh : Expel foreign substances from your body or move through solid objects
